current_priority_progress: March 30, 2026 release-grade closure restored. Ledger inventory totals 168 rows with 168 machine-checked rows. build_status: March 30, 2026: the Midnight proof-server and subsystem-scaffold tranche builds cleanly on the current tree. Passed checks this tranche: `cargo build --workspace --manifest-path /Users/sicarii/Desktop/ZirOS/Cargo.toml`. The workspace still emits existing warnings in `zkf-backends/src/metal_runtime.rs`, `zkf-runtime/src/metal_dispatch_macos.rs`, and `zkf-lib/src/app/edl_monte_carlo.rs`, but the new `zkf midnight proof-server serve` surface, the expanded subsystem scaffold outputs, the EDL crate-root export, and the EDL campaign attestation fix all compile together.
test_status: March 30, 2026: the Midnight proof-server and EDL export tranche passes the new and directly affected checks on the current tree: `cargo test -p zkf-cli midnight::tests:: -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-cli cmd::subsystem::tests:: -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-cli scaffolded_apps_run_smoke_tests_outside_workspace --manifest-path /Users/sicarii/Desktop/ZirOS/Cargo.toml -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-cli --manifest-path /Users/sicarii/Desktop/ZirOS/Cargo.toml --quiet`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib edl_monte_carlo_surface_is_reexported_at_crate_root --lib --manifest-path /Users/sicarii/Desktop/ZirOS/Cargo.toml -- --nocapture`; and `cargo test -p zkf-lib edl_campaign_roundtrip --lib --manifest-path /Users/sicarii/Desktop/ZirOS/Cargo.toml -- --nocapture`. A broader `cargo test -p zkf-lib --lib --no-fail-fast --manifest-path /Users/sicarii/Desktop/ZirOS/Cargo.toml` sweep still fails on current-tree issues outside this tranche: missing `zkf-protocol-proofs/*Exact.lean` evidence paths referenced by the generated closure checks, two orbital GPU-attribution expectation mismatches, and a missing EPA fixture at `docs/examples/fixtures/epa/zirapp.json`.
recent_delivery: Added a CLI-first Midnight integration surface to ZirOS: `zkf midnight proof-server serve` now fronts the official Midnight proof-server contract on port 6300, with compatibility tests against real serialized `/prove` and `/check` payloads and readiness via `/health`; expanded `zkf app init --template subsystem` to emit Midnight-oriented proof-server launch scripts, wallet/provider helpers, disclosure policy docs, NIGHT/DUST guidance, and a post-quantum anchor note; updated README, canonical-truth notes, and the support matrix to describe the new local proof-server boundary honestly; restored the standalone `zkf-tui` path crate needed by generated TUI scaffolds; exported `edl_monte_carlo` on the `zkf-lib` crate root; and fixed the EDL campaign attestation circuit so valid Plonky3 trajectory commitments no longer fail a spurious 63-bit range gate.
